title: CVE-2026-34446 - ONNX: Arbitrary File Read via ExternalData Hardlink Bypass in O

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - CVE-2026-34446 - ONNX: Arbitrary File Read via ExternalData 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX

detection:

    condition: selection_dns
level: high
